keywords.serpWeakness: Listicles are from 2019 or earlier, recommend dead wikis; fresh comparison with mobile-friendly and ad-free criteria absent.

keywords.serpWeakness: Fextralife ranks with auto-playing Twitch stream; very slow on mobile; users beg for minimal, checklist-style tracker.
Drops are spread across multiple fan pages; no sortable, searchable table with drop rates; mostly forum posts.
Only YouTube transcripts or fan site excerpts; no full text search across games; outdated HTML pages.
Literally no site positions itself as mobile-first NPC DB; all existing wikis fail mobile usability scores.
A few outdated JSON repos with no maintenance; no modern, contributor-friendly open-source NPC data project.
